fact_nuggets.text: Grass Pelt (Japanese: Grass Pelt) is an Ability introduced in Generation VI. It is the signature Ability of Skiddo and Gogoat.

Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] While Grassy Terrain is active, the Defense of the Pokemon with this Ability is increased by 50%. It does not affect self-inflicted confusion damage. Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] Grass Pelt has no effect outside of battle.
In battle [ edit | edit source ] While Grassy Terrain is active, the Defense of the Pokemon with this Ability is increased by 50%. It does not affect self-inflicted confusion damage.
Boosts Defense while grassy terrain is in effect.
